creator: wollman@lcs.mit.edu
text:
>> Number:         2628
>> Category:       kern
>> Synopsis:       code clean up of sys/sys

Fair warning: these patches are likely to prove extremely
controversial.  BSD tradition has always deprecated nested #includes,
and we have worked hard in recent times to eliminate as many of them
as we could.

-GAWollman
